readings.Aries: Someone is ready to follow your lead. Be worth following. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Taurus: Something you made with your hands or your time is more significant than you're giving it credit for. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Gemini: You adapt so well to other people's realities that you sometimes misplace your own. Locate it. The first instinct was right.
readings.Cancer: The feelings that seem too large to speak are usually smaller once they have words. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Leo: There's a difference between confidence and armour. Check which one you're wearing today. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Virgo: Something small is adding up to something significant. Your instinct to track it is correct. This is a better week for listening than speaking.
readings.Libra: Your instinct for what looks and feels right is calibrated finely. Trust it on the bigger questions too. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Scorpio: What's beneath the anger is more interesting than the anger. Go there. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Sagittarius: Your faith that things will work out is usually warranted. Today, pair it with a concrete step. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Capricorn: You have been responsible for long enough. Someone else can carry this today. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Aquarius: Your version of intimacy is unusual and real. Someone is trying to understand it. Help them. The resistance you feel is pointing at something worth examining.
readings.Pisces: There is a vision you've had repeatedly that is trying to become real. Give it some of your practical attention. The window for this is shorter than it looks.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
